entry.data:
PARTLY CLOUDY
LOWS IN THE MID 50S
SOUTHWEST WINDS 5 TO 10 MPH

SUNNY
HIGHS IN THE LOWER 80S
EAST WINDS AROUND 5 MPH, BECOMING SOUTHWEST AROUND 5 MPH IN THE AFTERNOON

MOSTLY CLEAR
LOWS IN THE LOWER 60S
SOUTH WINDS 5 TO 10 MPH

SUNNY
HIGHS IN THE MID 80S
SOUTHWEST WINDS 10 TO 15 MPH WITH GUSTS UP TO 25 MPH

PARTLY CLOUDY IN THE EVENING, THEN CLEARING
MUCH COOLER
LESS HUMID WITH LOWS IN THE LOWER 40S
NORTHWEST WINDS 10 TO 15 MPH, BECOMING NORTH AFTER MIDNIGHT

SUNNY
MUCH COOLER WITH HIGHS IN THE UPPER 50S

PARTLY CLOUDY IN THE EVENING, THEN BECOMING MOSTLY CLOUDY
LOWS AROUND 40

MOSTLY CLOUDY
HIGHS IN THE LOWER 60S
LOWS IN THE LOWER 40S

MOSTLY CLOUDY IN THE MORNING, THEN BECOMING PARTLY SUNNY
HIGHS IN THE UPPER 60S

PARTLY CLOUDY IN THE EVENING, THEN CLEARING
LOWS IN THE LOWER 50S

PARTLY CLOUDY IN THE EVENING, THEN BECOMING MOSTLY CLOUDY
A CHANCE OF SHOWERS
LOWS IN THE LOWER 40S
CHANCE OF RAIN 50 PERCENT

PARTLY SUNNY
A CHANCE OF SHOWERS IN THE MORNING
MUCH COOLER WITH HIGHS IN THE MID 50S
CHANCE OF RAIN 50 PERCENT
